description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the logimethods/docker-sbt-docker image with a docker:dind service and set DOCKER_DRIVER and SBT_OPTS variables. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a run_specifications job that runs sbt "project appJVM" test. In the deploy stage add a manual deploy_to_staging job that echoes "Pretending to deploy" and curls google.com, and runs only when manually triggered. Include a before_script that sources ci/docker_util.sh for all jobs.
